debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
C : Category α
D : Category β
F G : Functor α β
η : @CategoryInContext.NaturalTransformation α β C D F G
h : @CategoryInContext.IsNatIso α β C D F G η
X Y : α
f : Hom X Y
⊢ comp
      (have this := @h X;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)
      (Functor.homF f) =
    comp (Functor.homF f)
      (have this := @h Y;
      (fun f hf => f.inv) (Classical.choose ⋯) ⋯)

failed_attempts:
classical
    have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    rcases hX with ⟨iX, hiX⟩
    rcases hY with ⟨iY, hiY⟩
    simpa [NatIso_inverse, hiX, hiY] using congrArg (fun k => iX.inv ≫ k ≫ iY.inv) (η.naturality f).symm

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose i hi using hx
    choose j hj using hy
    have hi₁ : η.arrow X ≫ i.inv = D.id := by simpa using hi.1
    have hi₂ : i.inv ≫ η.arrow X = D.id := by simpa using hi.2
    have hj₁ : η.arrow Y ≫ j.inv = D.id := by simpa using hj.1
    have hj₂ : j.inv ≫ η.arrow Y = D.id := by simpa using hj.2
    have hη := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    have : (i.inv ≫ Functor.homF f) = (Functor.homF f ≫ j.inv) := by
      calc
        i.inv ≫ Functor.homF f
            = (i.inv ≫ (Functor.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y)) ≫ j.inv := by
                simp [assoc, hj₂]
        _   = ((i.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ (Functor.homF f)) ≫ j.inv := by
                simp [assoc, hη]
        _   = Functor.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
                simp [assoc, hi₂]
    simpa [arrow, hi, hj, assoc] using this

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    choose iX hiX using hX
    choose iY hiY using hY
    have hiX' := hiX.2
    have hiY' := hiY.2
    have nat := η.naturality f
    dsimp at nat
    have := congrArg (fun k => iX.inv ≫ k ≫ iY.inv) nat
    simp only [assoc] at this
    rw [← assoc, hiX', Category.id_comp] at this
    rw [assoc, hiY', Category.comp_id] at this
    simpa [arrow] using this

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    choose iX hiX using hX
    choose iY hiY using hY
    dsimp
    have nat := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    have invX : (iX.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X)) ≫ η.arrow X = D.id (G.F X) := by
      simpa [hiX] using iX.inv_comp
    have invY : η.arrow Y ≫ (iY.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) = D.id (F.F Y) := by
      simpa [hiY] using iY.comp_inv
    calc
      (iX.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X)) ≫ F.homF f
          = ((iX.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X)) ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f)) ≫ (iY.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) := by
              rw [assoc, ← assoc]
              congr 1
              rw [invX, Category.id_comp]
              rw [← assoc, invY, Category.comp_id]
      _ = ((iX.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X)) ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y)) ≫ (iY.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) := by
              rw [nat]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ (iY.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) := by
              rw [assoc, assoc, ← assoc (F.homF f)]
              congr 1
              rw [← assoc, hiX, iX.comp_inv, Category.id_comp]

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose iX hiX using hx
    choose iY hiY using hy
    have hX : η.arrow X ≫ iX.inv = D.id (F.F X) := by simpa using iX.hom_inv_id
    have hY : iY.inv ≫ η.arrow Y = D.id (G.F Y) := by simpa using iY.inv_hom_id
    apply (D.cancel_mono (η.arrow X))
    calc
      η.arrow X ≫ (iX.inv ≫ G.homF f)
          = (η.arrow X ≫ iX.inv) ≫ G.homF f := by rw [assoc]
      _   = G.homF f := by simpa [hX]
      _   = (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ iY.inv := by
              rw [← assoc, η.naturality f, assoc]
      _   = F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv) := by rw [assoc]
      _   = F.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
              have : η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv = D.id (F.F Y) := by simpa using iY.hom_inv_id
              simpa [this]

have thisX := h X
    have thisY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at thisX thisY
    choose iX hiX using thisX
    choose iY hiY using thisY
    have hX : η.arrow X ≫ iX.inv = D.id (F.F X) := by simpa using iX.inv_hom_id
    have hY : η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv = D.id (F.F Y) := by simpa using iY.inv_hom_id
    have hX' : iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X = D.id (G.F X) := by simpa using iX.hom_inv_id
    have hY' : iY.inv ≫ η.arrow Y = D.id (G.F Y) := by simpa using iY.hom_inv_id
    have nat := η.naturality f
    have nat' : (iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f = iX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) := by
      simpa [assoc] using congrArg (fun k => iX.inv ≫ k) nat
    have nat'' : G.homF f = iX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y := by
      simpa [assoc, hX'] using nat'
    have nat''' : G.homF f ≫ iY.inv = iX.inv ≫ F.homF f := by
      calc
        G.homF f ≫ iY.inv
            = (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ iY.inv := by simpa [assoc] using congrArg (fun k => k ≫ iY.inv) nat''
        _   = iX.inv ≫ F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv) := by simp [assoc]
        _   = iX.inv ≫ F.homF f := by simp [assoc, hY]
    simpa [arrow, thisX, thisY] using nat'''

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    choose i hi using hX
    choose j hj using hY
    have hi' : η.arrow X ≫ i.inv = Category.id := by simpa using hi.2
    have hj' : η.arrow Y ≫ j.inv = Category.id := by simpa using hj.2
    have hi1 : i.inv ≫ η.arrow X = Category.id := by simpa using hi.1
    have hj1 : j.inv ≫ η.arrow Y = Category.id := by simpa using hj.1
    have nat := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    calc
      i.inv ≫ F.homF f
          = (i.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ j.inv) := by
              simp [Category.comp, assoc, hj']
      _ = ((i.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ j.inv := by
              simp [Category.comp, assoc]
      _ = (i.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y)) ≫ j.inv := by
              simp [Category.comp, assoc]
      _ = (i.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f)) ≫ j.inv := by
              simp [Category.comp, assoc, nat]
      _ = ((i.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f) ≫ j.inv := by
              simp [Category.comp, assoc]
      _ = (Category.id ≫ G.homF f) ≫ j.inv := by
              simp [Category.comp, assoc, hi1]
      _ = G.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
              simp [Category.comp, assoc]

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose i hi using hx
    choose j hj using hy
    have hxinv : (i.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X)) = (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X)) := by
      have : (η.arrow X) ≫ (i.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X)) =
          (η.arrow X) ≫ (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X)) := by
        simpa [hi] using congrArg (fun t => (η.arrow X) ≫ t) (by rfl : i.hom = η.arrow X)
      exact (cancel_left _ _ _ this).symm
    have hyinv : (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) = (i.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) := by
      have : (η.arrow Y) ≫ (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) =
          (η.arrow Y) ≫ (i.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) := by
        simpa [hj] using congrArg (fun t => (η.arrow Y) ≫ t) (by rfl : j.hom = η.arrow Y)
      exact cancel_left _ _ _ this
    have nat := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    have nat' : (η.arrow X) ≫ (G.homF f) ≫ (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) =
        (F.homF f) ≫ (η.arrow Y) ≫ (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) := by
      simpa [assoc] using congrArg (fun t => t ≫ (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y))) nat
    have : (G.homF f) ≫ (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) =
        (i.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X)) ≫ (F.homF f) := by
      have lhs : (η.arrow X) ≫ ((G.homF f) ≫ (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y))) =
          (η.arrow X) ≫ ((i.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X)) ≫ (F.homF f)) := by
        calc
          (η.arrow X) ≫ ((G.homF f) ≫ (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)))
              = ((η.arrow X) ≫ (G.homF f)) ≫ (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) := by
                  simp [assoc]
          _ = ((F.homF f) ≫ (η.arrow Y)) ≫ (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y)) := by
                  simpa [assoc] using nat'
          _ = (F.homF f) ≫ ((η.arrow Y) ≫ (j.inv : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y))) := by
                  simp [assoc]
          _ = (F.homF f) ≫ (D.id _) := by
                  simpa [hj] using congrArg (fun t => (F.homF f) ≫ t) hj.right
          _ = (F.homF f) := by simp
          _ = (D.id _) ≫ (F.homF f) := by simp
          _ = ((η.arrow X) ≫ (i.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X))) ≫ (F.homF f) := by
                  simpa [hi] using congrArg (fun t => t ≫ (F.homF f)) hi.right.symm
          _ = (η.arrow X) ≫ ((i.inv : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X)) ≫ (F.homF f)) := by
                  simp [assoc]
      exact cancel_left _ _ _ lhs
    simpa [hxinv, hyinv, this] using this.symm

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose iX hiX using hx
    choose iY hiY using hy
    have hη := η.naturality f
    have hiX1 : (η.arrow X ≫ iX.inv) = 𝟙 _ := by simpa using iX.comp_inv
    have hiX2 : (iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) = 𝟙 _ := by simpa using iX.inv_comp
    have hiY1 : (η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv) = 𝟙 _ := by simpa using iY.comp_inv
    have hiY2 : (iY.inv ≫ η.arrow Y) = 𝟙 _ := by simpa using iY.inv_comp
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ F.homF f
          = (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv) := by
              simp [assoc, hiY1]
      _   = ((iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc, hη]
      _   = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc, hiX2]

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose i hi using hx
    choose j hj using hy
    have hn := η.naturality f
    have hi1 := i.hom_inv_id
    have hj1 := j.hom_inv_id
    simp at hi1 hj1
    -- i.inv ≫ G.homF f = F.homF f ≫ j.inv
    -- obtained by multiplying η's naturality by inverses
    calc
      i.inv ≫ G.homF f
          = (i.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ (G.homF f ≫ j.inv))) := by
              simp only [Category.comp, assoc, hj1]
      _   = i.inv ≫ ((η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ j.inv) := by
              simp only [Category.comp, assoc]
      _   = i.inv ≫ ((F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ j.inv) := by
              simp only [Category.comp, hn]
      _   = (i.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ j.inv))) := by
              simp only [Category.comp, assoc]
      _   = F.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
              simp only [Category.comp, assoc, hi1]

funext g
    have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    choose i hi using hX
    choose j hj using hY
    have hi_hom : i.hom = η.arrow X := by simpa [IsIso.hom] using (hi.1)
    have hj_hom : j.hom = η.arrow Y := by simpa [IsIso.hom] using (hj.1)
    have hi_inv : i.inv = (NatIso_inverse (F := F) (G := G) η h).arrow X := by
      rfl
    have hj_inv : j.inv = (NatIso_inverse (F := F) (G := G) η h).arrow Y := by
      rfl
    subst hi_hom
    subst hj_hom
    simp only [Category.comp, Function.comp_apply, Functor]
    -- use naturality of η and cancel with inverses
    calc
      (i.inv ≫ G.homF f) ≫ g
          = i.inv ≫ (G.homF f ≫ g) := by rw [assoc]
      _   = i.inv ≫ ((η.arrow X ≫ F.homF f) ≫ j.inv ≫ (j.hom ≫ g)) := by
            -- insert identities via j.inv ≫ j.hom = 𝟙
            have hj_id : j.inv ≫ j.hom = D.id (F.F Y) := by
              simpa [IsIso.inv, IsIso.hom, iso_iff_isIso] using (hj.2.1)
            -- rewrite using η.naturality
            -- η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f = F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y
            -- hence G.homF f = (i.hom ≫ G.homF f) with i.hom = η.arrow X etc
            -- We'll use simp chain
            simp [hj_id, assoc, η.naturality f]
      _   = (F.homF f ≫ j.inv) ≫ g := by
            -- cancel i.inv ≫ i.hom = 𝟙 and reassociate
            have hi_id : i.inv ≫ i.hom = D.id (G.F X) := by
              simpa [IsIso.inv, IsIso.hom, iso_iff_isIso] using (hi.2.1)
            simp [hi_id, assoc]

funext g
    have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose i hi using hx
    choose j hj using hy
    have hi1 : i.inv ≫ η.arrow X = D.id _ := by
      exact hi.2.2
    have hj1 : η.arrow Y ≫ j.inv = D.id _ := by
      exact hj.2.1
    calc
      i.inv ≫ (G.homF f g)
          = (i.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ (G.homF f g))) := by
              simpa [hi1, D.id_comp]
      _   = i.inv ≫ ((F.homF f (η.arrow Y g)) ≫ j.inv) := by
              simp [η.naturality f, assoc]
      _   = (F.homF f (j.inv g)) := by
              simp [assoc, hj1]

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    choose i hi using hX
    choose j hj using hY
    have hi₁ : i.hom ≫ i.inv = D.id := by simpa using i.hom_inv_id
    have hi₂ : i.inv ≫ i.hom = D.id := by simpa using i.inv_hom_id
    have hj₁ : j.hom ≫ j.inv = D.id := by simpa using j.hom_inv_id
    have hj₂ : j.inv ≫ j.hom = D.id := by simpa using j.inv_hom_id
    have hη : ∀ {A B : α} (g : C.Hom A B),
        η.arrow A ≫ G.homF g = F.homF g ≫ η.arrow B := by
      intro A B g
      simpa using η.naturality g
    have hx : η.arrow X = i.hom := by simpa [hi] 
    have hy : η.arrow Y = j.hom := by simpa [hj]
    -- show: i.inv ≫ F.homF f = G.homF f ≫ j.inv
    -- derive from naturality using cancellations
    have hn : i.hom ≫ G.homF f = F.homF f ≫ j.hom := by
      simpa [hx, hy] using hη f
    calc
      i.inv ≫ F.homF f
          = (i.inv ≫ (i.hom ≫ (G.homF f))) ≫ j.inv := by
              rw [assoc, hn, assoc, assoc]
    _ = G.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
          -- simplify using inverse identities
          rw [← assoc, ← assoc, hi₂, D.left_id, hj₁, D.right_id]

have hX : IsIso (η.arrow X) := h X
    have hY : IsIso (η.arrow Y) := h Y
    have nat := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    apply (cancel_mono (η.arrow Y))
    simpa [assoc] using congrArg (fun k => k ≫ η.arrow Y) (by
      calc
        (by
          have := hX
          rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this
          choose i hi using this
          exact i.inv) ≫ G.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y
            = (by
                have := hX
                rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this
                choose i hi using this
                exact i.inv) ≫ (G.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) := by rw [assoc]
        _ = (by
              have := hX
              rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this
              choose i hi using this
              exact i.inv) ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ F.homF f) := by simpa [assoc] using congrArg (fun k => k) nat.symm
        _ = ((by
                have := hX
                rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this
                choose i hi using this
                exact i.inv) ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ F.homF f := by rw [assoc]
        _ = (𝟙 _) ≫ F.homF f := by
              have := hX
              rw [iso_iff_isIso] at this
              choose i hi using this
              simpa using congrArg (fun k => k ≫ F.homF f) hi.2
        _ = F.homF f := by simp
      )

have hx : IsIso (η.arrow X) := h X
    have hy : IsIso (η.arrow Y) := h Y
    have hx' := (iso_iff_isIso (f := η.arrow X)).2 hx
    have hy' := (iso_iff_isIso (f := η.arrow Y)).2 hy
    rcases hx' with ⟨iX, hiX⟩
    rcases hy' with ⟨iY, hiY⟩
    have hX : (arrow (α := α) (β := β) (C := C) (D := D) (F := F) (G := G) η h X) = iX.inv := by
      simp [NatIso_inverse, hiX]
    have hY : (arrow (α := α) (β := β) (C := C) (D := D) (F := F) (G := G) η h Y) = iY.inv := by
      simp [NatIso_inverse, hiY]
    subst hX
    subst hY
    have hn := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    have hn1 : iX.inv ≫ G.homF f = F.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
      calc
        iX.inv ≫ G.homF f
            = iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ (G.homF f)) := by
                simp [hiX.2]
        _   = iX.inv ≫ ((F.homF f) ≫ (η.arrow Y)) := by
                simp [assoc, hn]
        _   = (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ η.arrow Y := by
                simp [assoc]
        _   = (F.homF f) ≫ (iY.inv ≫ η.arrow Y) := by
                simp [assoc, hiX.1]
        _   = F.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
                simp [assoc, hiY.2]
    simpa [assoc] using hn1

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose iX hiX using hx
    choose iY hiY using hy
    have hx_inv : (η.arrow X) ≫ iX.inv = D.id (F.F X) := by simpa [hiX]
    have hy_inv : (η.arrow Y) ≫ iY.inv = D.id (F.F Y) := by simpa [hiY]
    have hx_inv' : iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X) = D.id (G.F X) := by simpa [hiX]
    have hy_inv' : iY.inv ≫ (η.arrow Y) = D.id (G.F Y) := by simpa [hiY]
    have nat := η.naturality f
    calc
      (iX.inv) ≫ (F.homF f)
          = (iX.inv) ≫ (F.homF f) ≫ (D.id (F.F Y)) := by
              simp [Category.id_right]
      _ = (iX.inv) ≫ (F.homF f) ≫ ((η.arrow Y) ≫ iY.inv) := by
              simp [hy_inv]
      _ = (iX.inv) ≫ ((F.homF f) ≫ (η.arrow Y)) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc]
      _ = (iX.inv) ≫ ((η.arrow X) ≫ (G.homF f)) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [nat]
      _ = ((iX.inv) ≫ (η.arrow X)) ≫ (G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc]
      _ = (D.id (G.F X)) ≫ (G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [hx_inv']
      _ = (G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [Category.id_left, assoc]

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    classical
    rcases hX with ⟨iX, hiX⟩
    rcases hY with ⟨iY, hiY⟩
    have hη := η.naturality f
    have leftX : (iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) = D.id (G.F X) := by
      simpa [hiX] using congrArg Iso.inv_hom_id iX
    have rightY : (η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv) = D.id (F.F Y) := by
      simpa [hiY] using congrArg Iso.hom_inv_id iY
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ G.homF f
          = (iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ (G.homF f ≫ iY.inv))) ≫ η.arrow Y := by
              simp [assoc, leftX, rightY]
      _ = (iX.inv ≫ ((F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ iY.inv)) ≫ η.arrow Y := by
              simp [assoc, hη]
      _ = F.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc, leftX, rightY]

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose i hi using hx
    choose j hj using hy
    have hη : η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f = F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y := η.naturality f
    have hi_hom : i.hom = η.arrow X := by simpa [hi]
    have hj_hom : j.hom = η.arrow Y := by simpa [hj]
    calc
      i.inv ≫ G.homF f
          = i.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) := by
              simpa [hi_hom] using congrArg (fun t => i.inv ≫ t) (by
                simpa [hi_hom] using (show i.hom = η.arrow X from hi_hom))
      _ = i.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) := by simpa [hη]
      _ = (i.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ η.arrow Y := by rw [assoc]
      _ = F.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
            have : (i.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ η.arrow Y = F.homF f := by
              calc
                (i.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ η.arrow Y
                    = i.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) := by rw [assoc]
                _ = i.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) := by simpa [hη]
                _ = (i.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f := by rw [assoc]
                _ = 𝟙 _ ≫ G.homF f := by
                      have := i.inv_hom_id
                      simpa [hi_hom] using this
                _ = G.homF f := by simp
            have : i.inv ≫ F.homF f = F.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
              have hj_hom' : j.hom = η.arrow Y := hj_hom
              have := congrArg (fun t => t ≫ j.inv) hη
              simp [assoc, hj_hom'] at this
              calc
                i.inv ≫ F.homF f
                    = (i.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ 𝟙 _ := by simp
                _ = (i.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ j.inv) := by
                      have := j.hom_inv_id
                      simpa [hj_hom'] using congrArg (fun t => (i.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ t) this
                _ = ((i.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ j.inv := by rw [assoc]
                _ = F.homF f ≫ j.inv := by simpa [this] using rfl
            simpa [assoc] using congrArg (fun t => t ≫ j.inv) this

classical
    have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose i hi using hx
    choose j hj using hy
    have hn := η.naturality f
    have hn' : j.inv ≫ Functor.homF f = Functor.homF f ≫ i.inv := by
      have : (i.inv ≫ (j.inv ≫ Functor.homF f)) = (i.inv ≫ (Functor.homF f ≫ i.inv)) := by
        calc
          i.inv ≫ (j.inv ≫ Functor.homF f)
              = (i.inv ≫ j.inv) ≫ Functor.homF f := by rw [assoc]
          _   = (i.inv ≫ (η.arrow Y)) ≫ (j.inv ≫ Functor.homF f) := by
                simpa [hi.2] using rfl
          _   = i.inv ≫ ((η.arrow Y) ≫ (j.inv ≫ Functor.homF f)) := by rw [assoc]
          _   = i.inv ≫ (((η.arrow Y) ≫ j.inv) ≫ Functor.homF f) := by rw [assoc]
          _   = i.inv ≫ (Category.id _ ≫ Functor.homF f) := by
                simp [hj.2, Category.comp, Category.id]
          _   = i.inv ≫ Functor.homF f := by simp [Category.comp, Category.id]
          _   = (i.inv ≫ Functor.homF f) ≫ i.inv := by rw [assoc]
          _   = i.inv ≫ (Functor.homF f ≫ i.inv) := by rw [assoc]
      have : (i.inv ≫ j.inv) ≫ Functor.homF f = (i.inv ≫ Functor.homF f) ≫ i.inv := by
        simpa [assoc] using this
      have : j.inv ≫ Functor.homF f = Functor.homF f ≫ i.inv := by
        -- cancel i.inv on the left using hi.1 : i.inv ≫ η.arrow X = 𝟙
        calc
          j.inv ≫ Functor.homF f
              = (Category.id _) ≫ (j.inv ≫ Functor.homF f) := by simp [Category.comp, Category.id]
          _   = ((i.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ) ≫ (j.inv ≫ Functor.homF f) := by simpa [hi.1]
          _   = i.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ (j.inv ≫ Functor.homF f)) := by rw [assoc]
          _   = i.inv ≫ ((η.arrow X ≫ Functor.homF f) ≫ i.inv) := by
                -- use naturality then hj.1 : η.arrow Y ≫ j.inv = 𝟙
                have : η.arrow X ≫ Functor.homF f = Functor.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y := by
                  simpa [Category.comp] using (hn)
                -- rewrite
                -- ηX ≫ Gf = Ff ≫ ηY, but here Functor.homF f is shared; rely on simp/assoc
                -- Note: hn already is arrow X ≫ G.homF f = F.homF f ≫ arrow Y,
                -- and here both functors are those in the structure, so Functor.homF is ok.
                -- We now append ≫ j.inv and use hj.1.
                calc
                  η.arrow X ≫ (j.inv ≫ Functor.homF f)
                      = (η.arrow X ≫ j.inv) ≫ Functor.homF f := by rw [assoc]
                  _   = (η.arrow X ≫ j.inv) ≫ Functor.homF f := rfl
                  _   = ((η.arrow X ≫ Functor.homF f) ≫ j.inv) := by rw [assoc]
                  _   = ((Functor.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ j.inv) := by simpa [assoc] using congrArg (fun t => t) this
                  _   = Functor.homF f ≫ ((η.arrow Y) ≫ j.inv) := by rw [assoc]
                  _   = Functor.homF f ≫ Category.id _ := by simpa [hj.1]
                  _   = Functor.homF f := by simp [Category.comp, Category.id]
          _   = i.inv ≫ (Functor.homF f ≫ i.inv) := by rw [assoc]
          _   = (i.inv ≫ Functor.homF f) ≫ i.inv := by rw [assoc]
          _   = Functor.homF f ≫ i.inv := by
                -- cancel i.inv on the right using hi.2 : η.arrow X ≫ i.inv = 𝟙
                -- here we use hi.2 indirectly: (i.inv ≫ Functor.homF f) = Functor.homF f ≫ i.inv follows from associativity already in previous line
                -- simplify
                simpa [Category.comp, Category.id, assoc] using rfl
      exact this
    simpa [NatIso_inverse, NaturalTransformation, Category.comp, assoc] using hn'

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose i hi using hx
    choose j hj using hy
    have hi2 : η.arrow X ≫ i.inv = D.id (F.F X) := by
      simpa [hi.hom] using i.inv_hom_id
    have hj2 : η.arrow Y ≫ j.inv = D.id (F.F Y) := by
      simpa [hj.hom] using j.inv_hom_id
    have hi3 : i.inv ≫ η.arrow X = D.id (G.F X) := by
      simpa [hi.hom] using i.hom_inv_id
    have hj3 : j.inv ≫ η.arrow Y = D.id (G.F Y) := by
      simpa [hj.hom] using j.hom_inv_id
    have nat := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    have : i.inv ≫ G.homF f = F.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
      calc
        i.inv ≫ G.homF f
            = (i.inv ≫ G.homF f) ≫ η.arrow Y ≫ j.inv := by
                rw [assoc, assoc, hj2]
                simp [Category.id_comp]
        _   = i.inv ≫ (G.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ j.inv := by
                simp [assoc]
        _   = i.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ F.homF f) ≫ j.inv := by
                simp [nat, assoc]
        _   = (i.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ F.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
                simp [assoc]
        _   = F.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
                rw [hi3]
                simp [Category.id_comp, assoc]
    simpa [arrow, hi, hj, Hom_c_?, Function.comp_apply, assoc] using this

funext g
    have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hy
    rcases hx with ⟨iX, hiX⟩
    rcases hy with ⟨iY, hiY⟩
    have hη := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    -- cancel using the inverse data coming from `hiX` and `hiY`
    -- `hiX` and `hiY` give the isomorphism data for `η.arrow _`
    -- use associativity plus the triangle equalities
    have leftInvX : (iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) = D.id := by
      simpa [iso_iff_isIso] using (And.left hiX)
    have rightInvY : (η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv) = D.id := by
      simpa [iso_iff_isIso] using (And.right hiY)
    -- now compute
    calc
      (iX.inv ≫ G.homF f) g
          = (iX.inv ≫ (G.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ iY.inv) g := by
              simp [Category.comp, Function.comp_apply, assoc, rightInvY]
      _ = (iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ F.homF f) ≫ iY.inv) g := by
              simp [Category.comp, Function.comp_apply, assoc, hη]
      _ = (F.homF f ≫ iY.inv) g := by
              simp [Category.comp, Function.comp_apply, assoc, leftInvX]

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose iX hiX using hx
    choose iY hiY using hy
    have hxinv : arrow η X ≫ iX.inv = D.id := by simpa [hiX.hom_inv_id] using hiX.hom_inv_id
    have hyinv : arrow η Y ≫ iY.inv = D.id := by simpa [hiY.hom_inv_id] using hiY.hom_inv_id
    have hxinv' : iX.inv ≫ arrow η X = D.id := by simpa [hiX.inv_hom_id] using hiX.inv_hom_id
    have hyinv' : iY.inv ≫ arrow η Y = D.id := by simpa [hiY.inv_hom_id] using hiY.inv_hom_id
    have nat := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    calc
      comp iX.inv (Functor.homF f)
          = comp iX.inv (comp (Functor.homF f) (D.id)) := by
              simp only [Category.comp, assoc, D.id_comp, D.comp_id]
      _   = comp iX.inv (comp (Functor.homF f) (comp (arrow η Y) iY.inv)) := by
              simp only [Category.comp, assoc, hyinv, D.comp_id]
      _   = comp (comp iX.inv (Functor.homF f)) (comp (arrow η Y) iY.inv) := by
              simp only [Category.comp, assoc]
      _   = comp (comp (D.id) (Functor.homF f)) iY.inv := by
              simp only [Category.comp, assoc, nat, hxinv', D.id_comp]
      _   = comp (Functor.homF f) iY.inv := by
              simp only [Category.comp, assoc, D.id_comp]

classical
    have thisX := h X
    have thisY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at thisX thisY
    choose iX hiX using thisX
    choose iY hiY using thisY
    have hx : η.arrow X ≫ iX.inv = D.id (F.F X) := by
      simpa [hiX] using iX.hom_inv_id
    have hy : η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv = D.id (F.F Y) := by
      simpa [hiY] using iY.hom_inv_id
    have hx' : iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X = D.id (G.F X) := by
      simpa [hiX] using iX.inv_hom_id
    have hy' : iY.inv ≫ η.arrow Y = D.id (G.F Y) := by
      simpa [hiY] using iY.inv_hom_id
    have nat := η.naturality f
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ G.homF f
          = (iX.inv ≫ (G.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y)) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc, hy]
      _   = (iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ F.homF f)) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc, nat]
      _   = F.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc, hx']

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    classical
    choose iX hiX using hx
    choose iY hiY using hy
    dsimp
    have hx1 : (η.arrow X) ≫ iX.inv = D.id _ := by
      simpa using iX.hom_inv_id
    have hx2 : iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X) = D.id _ := by
      simpa using iX.inv_hom_id
    have hy1 : (η.arrow Y) ≫ iY.inv = D.id _ := by
      simpa using iY.hom_inv_id
    have hy2 : iY.inv ≫ (η.arrow Y) = D.id _ := by
      simpa using iY.inv_hom_id
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ G.homF f
          = (iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X)) ≫ (iX.hom ≫ G.homF f) := by
              simp [assoc]
      _   = iX.inv ≫ ((η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f)) := by
              simp [assoc]
      _   = iX.inv ≫ ((F.homF f) ≫ η.arrow Y) := by
              simp [η.naturality f]
      _   = (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ η.arrow Y := by
              simp [assoc]
      _   = ((G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv) ≫ η.arrow Y := by
              have := congrArg (fun k => iX.inv ≫ k ≫ iY.inv) (η.naturality f)
              simpa [assoc, hx2, hy1, D.id_comp, D.comp_id] using this
      _   = G.homF f ≫ (iY.inv ≫ η.arrow Y) := by
              simp [assoc]
      _   = G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [hy2, D.comp_id]

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    rcases hX with ⟨iX, hiX⟩
    rcases hY with ⟨iY, hiY⟩
    have hx := congrArg Iso.inv hiX
    have hy := congrArg Iso.inv hiY
    subst hx
    subst hy
    simpa [NatIso_inverse, Category.comp] using (congrArg Iso.inv (η.naturality f)).symm

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose iX hiX using hx
    choose iY hiY using hy
    have hx₁ : η.arrow X ≫ iX.inv = D.id := by simpa using hiX.1
    have hx₂ : iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X = D.id := by simpa using hiX.2
    have hy₁ : η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv = D.id := by simpa using hiY.1
    have hy₂ : iY.inv ≫ η.arrow Y = D.id := by simpa using hiY.2
    have hη := η.naturality f
    calc
      (iX.inv ≫ G.homF f)
          = (iX.inv ≫ (G.homF f ≫ D.id)) := by
              simp [assoc]
      _ = (iX.inv ≫ (G.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv))) := by
              simp [hy₁, assoc]
      _ = (iX.inv ≫ ((G.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ iY.inv)) := by
              simp [assoc]
      _ = (iX.inv ≫ ((η.arrow X ≫ F.homF f) ≫ iY.inv)) := by
              simp [hη, assoc]
      _ = ((iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ F.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc]
      _ = (D.id ≫ F.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [hx₂, assoc]
      _ = (F.homF f ≫ D.id) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc]
      _ = F.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc]

funext g
    have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose i hi using hx
    choose j hj using hy
    have hx' : η.arrow X ≫ i.inv = D.id _ := by simpa [hi]
    have hy' : η.arrow Y ≫ j.inv = D.id _ := by simpa [hj]
    calc
      (i.inv ≫ G.homF f) g
          = ((i.inv ≫ G.homF f) ≫ D.id _) g := by simp
      _ = ((i.inv ≫ G.homF f) ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ j.inv)) g := by simpa [hy']
      _ = (i.inv ≫ (G.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ j.inv) g := by simp [assoc]
      _ = (i.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ F.homF f) ≫ j.inv) g := by
            simp [assoc, (η.naturality f).symm]
      _ = ((i.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ F.homF f ≫ j.inv) g := by simp [assoc]
      _ = ((D.id _ ) ≫ F.homF f ≫ j.inv) g := by simpa [assoc, hx']
      _ = ((F.homF f) ≫ j.inv) g := by simp [assoc]

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    choose i hi using hX
    choose j hj using hY
    have hi_hom : η.arrow X = i.hom := by simpa [hi]
    have hj_hom : η.arrow Y = j.hom := by simpa [hj]
    have hi_inv : (show D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X) from i.inv) = (by simpa [hi_hom] using (rfl : i.inv = i.inv)) := rfl
    have hj_inv : (show D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y) from j.inv) = (by simpa [hj_hom] using (rfl : j.inv = j.inv)) := rfl
    have invX : D.Hom (G.F X) (F.F X) := i.inv
    have invY : D.Hom (G.F Y) (F.F Y) := j.inv
    have natη : η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f = F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y := η.naturality f
    have : invX ≫ F.homF f = G.homF f ≫ invY := by
      have hx : invX ≫ η.arrow X = D.id (G.F X) := by
        simpa [hi_hom] using i.inv_hom_id
      have hy : η.arrow Y ≫ invY = D.id (F.F Y) := by
        simpa [hj_hom] using j.hom_inv_id
      calc
        invX ≫ F.homF f
            = invX ≫ (F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ invY)) := by
                simp [assoc, hy]
        _   = invX ≫ ((η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ invY) := by
                simp [assoc, natη]
        _   = (invX ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ (G.homF f ≫ invY) := by
                simp [assoc]
        _   = G.homF f ≫ invY := by
                simp [hx, assoc]
    simpa [arrow, hi, hj] using this

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    choose iX hiX using hX
    choose iY hiY using hY
    have hx : arrow η X ≫ iX.inv = 𝟙 (G.F X) := by simpa using iX.hom_inv_id
    have hy : arrow η Y ≫ iY.inv = 𝟙 (G.F Y) := by simpa using iY.hom_inv_id
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ G.homF f
          = (𝟙 (G.F X)) ≫ (iX.inv ≫ G.homF f) := by simpa using (Category.id_comp (iX.inv ≫ G.homF f)).symm
      _   = (arrow η X ≫ iX.inv) ≫ G.homF f := by simpa [hx]
      _   = arrow η X ≫ (iX.inv ≫ G.homF f) := by rw [assoc]
      _   = arrow η X ≫ ((G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv) := by
              apply congrArg (fun t => arrow η X ≫ t)
              have nat := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
              calc
                iX.inv ≫ G.homF f
                    = (iX.inv ≫ (arrow η X ≫ G.homF f)) ≫ iY.inv := by
                        rw [assoc, assoc]
                _   = (iX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ arrow η Y)) ≫ iY.inv := by
                        simp [nat]
                _   = ((iX.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ arrow η Y) ≫ iY.inv := by
                        rw [assoc]
                _   = (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ (arrow η Y ≫ iY.inv) := by
                        rw [assoc]
                _   = (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ (𝟙 (G.F Y)) := by simpa [hy]
                _   = iX.inv ≫ F.homF f := by simpa using (Category.comp_id (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f))
                _   = (G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by
                        have : (arrow η X ≫ (iX.inv ≫ G.homF f)) = (arrow η X ≫ (G.homF f ≫ iY.inv)) := by
                          rfl
                        exact by
                          have nat := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
                          calc
                            G.homF f ≫ iY.inv
                                = (𝟙 (G.F X)) ≫ (G.homF f ≫ iY.inv) := by
                                    simpa using (Category.id_comp (G.homF f ≫ iY.inv)).symm
                            _   = (arrow η X ≫ iX.inv) ≫ (G.homF f ≫ iY.inv) := by simpa [hx]
                            _   = arrow η X ≫ (iX.inv ≫ (G.homF f ≫ iY.inv)) := by
                                    rw [assoc, assoc]
                            _   = arrow η X ≫ ((iX.inv ≫ G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv) := by
                                    rw [assoc]
                            _   = arrow η X ≫ (iX.inv ≫ (G.homF f ≫ iY.inv)) := by
                                    rw [assoc]
      _   = (arrow η X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by rw [assoc]
      _   = (F.homF f ≫ arrow η Y) ≫ iY.inv := by simpa using congrArg (fun t => t ≫ iY.inv) (η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f)
      _   = F.homF f ≫ (arrow η Y ≫ iY.inv) := by rw [assoc]
      _   = F.homF f ≫ (𝟙 (G.F Y)) := by simp [hy]
      _   = F.homF f := by simpa using (Category.comp_id (F.homF f))

have hx := h X
    have hy := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hx hy
    choose i hi using hx
    choose j hj using hy
    have hx : (arrow (η := η) X) ≫ i.inv = D.id (F.F X) := by
      simpa using i.hom_inv_id
    have hy : (arrow (η := η) Y) ≫ j.inv = D.id (F.F Y) := by
      simpa using j.hom_inv_id
    have hx' : i.inv ≫ (arrow (η := η) X) = D.id (G.F X) := by
      simpa using i.inv_hom_id
    have hy' : j.inv ≫ (arrow (η := η) Y) = D.id (G.F Y) := by
      simpa using j.inv_hom_id
    have nat := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    -- show i.inv ≫ G.homF f = F.homF f ≫ j.inv
    have : i.inv ≫ G.homF f = F.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
      calc
        i.inv ≫ G.homF f
            = (i.inv ≫ G.homF f) ≫ (arrow (η := η) Y) ≫ j.inv := by
                simp [assoc, hy]
        _   = i.inv ≫ ((G.homF f ≫ arrow (η := η) Y) ≫ j.inv) := by
                simp [assoc]
        _   = i.inv ≫ ((arrow (η := η) X ≫ F.homF f) ≫ j.inv) := by
                simpa [assoc] using congrArg (fun k => k ≫ j.inv) nat.symm
        _   = (i.inv ≫ arrow (η := η) X) ≫ F.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
                simp [assoc]
        _   = F.homF f ≫ j.inv := by
                simp [assoc, hx']
    simpa [NatIso_inverse, arrow] using this

have hX : IsIso (η.arrow X) := h X
    have hY : IsIso (η.arrow Y) := h Y
    have hx := (inv_hom_eq_iff_eq_hom (f := η.arrow X) (g := G.homF f ≫ (inv (η.arrow Y)))).2 ?_
    · simpa [Category.comp, assoc] using hx
    · have hn : η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f = F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y := η.naturality f
      calc
        η.arrow X ≫ (G.homF f ≫ inv (η.arrow Y))
            = (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ inv (η.arrow Y) := by rw [assoc]
        _   = (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ inv (η.arrow Y) := by simpa [hn]
        _   = F.homF f ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ inv (η.arrow Y)) := by rw [assoc]
        _   = F.homF f ≫ 𝟙 _ := by simp [hY]
        _   = F.homF f := by simp

have hX := h X
    have hY := h Y
    rw [iso_iff_isIso] at hX hY
    classical
    rcases hX with ⟨iX, hiX⟩
    rcases hY with ⟨iY, hiY⟩
    have natη := η.naturality (X := X) (Y := Y) f
    have invX : (iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) = D.id _ := by
      have := iX.inv_hom_id
      simpa [hiX] using this
    have invY : (η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv) = D.id _ := by
      have := iY.hom_inv_id
      simpa [hiY] using this
    calc
      iX.inv ≫ G.homF f
          = (iX.inv ≫ η.arrow X) ≫ G.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc, invX, invY]
      _   = iX.inv ≫ (η.arrow X ≫ G.homF f) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc]
      _   = iX.inv ≫ (F.homF f ≫ η.arrow Y) ≫ iY.inv := by
              simpa [natη]
      _   = (iX.inv ≫ F.homF f) ≫ (η.arrow Y ≫ iY.inv) := by
              simp [assoc]
      _   = F.homF f ≫ iY.inv := by
              simp [assoc, invY]
